$comment: Cluster-F F5 (decl_string_global): symbol-address GLOBALS — `static int *p = ⌖` (&global) + `static const char *msg = "hello";` (string->rodata). Each global's pointer slot is filled by an abs64 RELOCATION the linker resolves to the target's VA — the new cross-format mechanism (PE .data-gate + ELF/Mach-O data-item reloc appliers; abs64 found by formula widthBytes==8 && !pcRelative). exit 143 == *p(42) + msg[1]('e'=101); an unpatched/null pointer SIGSEGVs instead.
